description: American outlaw motorcycle club formed in Boise, Idaho in 1969 by a group of high school friends. Active in Idaho, Washington, and Oregon, it has been involved in methamphetamine trafficking and alliances with other clubs like the Bandidos. The club's colors are black and gold, and its center patch features a winged skull.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Brothers Speed in Idaho have allegedly been involved in sending methamphetamine, sealed inside the frames of motorcycles, to the Rebels in Sydney , Australia.
country_links.context: The Brother Speed chapter in Idaho sent methamphetamine to the Rebels in Sydney, Australia.
